untranslatable_reason: Signal requires construction of lagged volatility bands with 1-period lag offset and dynamic standard deviation multiplier bands. The allowed indicator set does not include: (1) lagged moving average calculations offset by 1 day, (2) custom standard deviation bands built from lagged data, or (3) explicit band_width_multiplier implementation. While Bollinger Bands (bb_upper, bb_lower) are available, they cannot be configured with 1-day lag offset or custom multipliers as required. The thresholds [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are placeholders that require parameter specification. Recommend implementing custom indicator: lagged_sma_20, lagged_std_20, vol_band_upper, vol_band_lower.
translation_notes: Signal uses volatility bands with specific lag logic not expressible in standard indicator set. Entry based on price exceeding lagged moving average ± N standard deviations requires custom indicator construction. Lookback period of 20 days inferred from source text. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal specification.
